title: High-Trend International GAAP EPS of -$4.18, revenue of $214.4M
content:
* High-Trend International press release [https://seekingalpha.com/pr/20374926-high-trend-international-group-announces-nearly-98-percent-revenue-growth-for-fiscal-year] (HTCO [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/HTCO]): FY GAAP EPS of -$4.18.
 	* Revenue of $214.4M.
 	* Ocean freight revenue jumped 103% year-over-year, with total voyage days more than doubling
 	* Operating cash flow turned positive at approximately US$4.6 million
 	* Cash and cash equivalents increased to approximately US$10.1 million as of October 31, 2025

MORE ON HIGH-TREND INTERNATIONAL

 	* Seeking Alpha’s Quant Rating on High-Trend International [https://seekingalpha.com/symbol/HTCO/ratings/quant-ratings]
